title: Dream — pursued by universities + billionaire vouches, Mar 2023
html:
TL;DR

  • A short, vivid dream: Yahir is one of the most pursued people in the US — entire universities and communities hunting him over a "small inconsiderate thing that grew into me going to jail seriously for larger time."
  • The resolution: a council led by a billionaire and his son Henry vouches for his character. Dad and brother Emilio have his back.
  • Repeats Yahir's recurring persecuted-but-vindicated dream archetype — also see 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep (mom's drill setup), 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight (squad picks him off).

Key beat

"In the end people vouched for my character with a council led by billionaire and his son Henry. My dad and brother always having my back."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The "billionaire and son Henry" pairing is suggestive — possibly a Trump coded father-son council figure, or a Yahir-imagined patron. Worth tracking if Henry recurs in dreams.
  • "Dad and brother always having my back" is a recurring family-as-defense-line theme — also explicitly noted in 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep and the dad-monster contrast of 2023 05 08 dream dad monster.
  • Adds a data point to the note as letter to self / dream-corpus thread that suggests Yahir's psyche stages trial-by-public scenarios about his own legitimacy — pre-figuring the actual public-stake-claiming move he makes by 2026 with rankett.

Open questions

  • Who is "Henry"? Henry osmer (in the 2025 06 22 wedding list friends list) or someone else?
  • What did the dream version of Yahir do that "grew into" jail time? Even within the dream Yahir suspects the cause was ambiguous.

Wikilinks
